sections.paragraph:
, בְּכֹרָה f.

(1) firstborn, firstling; pl. בְּכֹרֹות firstborn offspring; of men, Neh 10:37 of the young of beasts, Gen 4:4 Deu 12:6, 17 Deu 12:17 14:23 .

(2) subst. primogeniture, birth-right, Gen 43:33. Opp. to מִשְׁפַּט הַבְּכֹרָה ·צְעִירָה “the right of primogeniture,” or birth-right, Deu 21:17. As to the same ellipt. בְּכֹורָה Gen 25:31, 34 Gen 25:34 27:36 .
